Module com.hack23.cia.model.internal.application.user.impl
Package com.hack23.cia.model.internal.application.data.impl

Class ViewElectionCycleComparativeAnalysis

java.lang.Object
com.hack23.cia.model.internal.application.data.impl.ViewElectionCycleComparativeAnalysis
All Implemented Interfaces:
com.hack23.cia.model.common.api.ModelObject, java.io.Serializable
@Entity(name="ViewElectionCycleComparativeAnalysis") public class ViewElectionCycleComparativeAnalysis extends java.lang.Object implements com.hack23.cia.model.common.api.ModelObject
The Class ViewElectionCycleComparativeAnalysis. Comparative party-level performance metrics across election cycles.
Since:
v1.51 (Election Cycle Analytics)
Author:
intelligence-operative
